zh.Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金
zh.Eastwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾伊斯威特
zh.Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Erskine於1280年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Sir John Erskine Of Mar31歲，母親Margaret Macgilronan32歲。她於大約1300年與John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Erskine于1280年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Sir John Erskine Of Mar31岁，母亲Margaret Macgilronan32岁。她于大约1300年与John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham在苏格兰雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在苏格兰雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Erskine was born in 1280, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Macgilronan, was 32. She married John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham about 1300, in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1360, in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Erskine est née en 1280, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Macgilronan, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham environ 1300, à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Erskine 1280 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Erskine Of Mar 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Macgilronan 32. Sie hat um 1300 in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Erskine è nata il nel 1280 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Macgilronan, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham circa 1300, nel Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1360, nel Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキン
ja.Eastwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland: スコットランドラナルクシュアイアエアストウッド
ja.Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Janet Erskineが1280年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir John Erskine Of Marは31歳，母Margaret Macgilronanは32歳であった。約1300年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムでJohn Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eagleshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムで80歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Erskine(이)가 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Erskine Of Mar(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Macgilronan(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Erskine nasceu em 1280, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Macgilronan, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham aproximadamente 1300, em Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Erskine родилась в 1280 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Erskine Of Mar было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Macgilronan, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham около 1300 г. в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Erskine nació en 1280, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Macgilronan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Montgomery of Eaglesham and Eastwood 7th Lord of Eaglesham aproximadamente 1300, en Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1360, en Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
